text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's the moment you've all been waiting for—the
Mainichi Okan is about to begin! The racers are
itching to test their chops before the autumn
Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, with this level of hype, you'd think the
crowd was here for a G1 race. Guess everyone's
really been looking forward to this.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
There's Mejiro Ardan, Oguri Cap, even Inari
One... Powerhouses as far as the eye can see.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Especially Oguri Cap and Inari One. Since they're
part of...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: The Eternal Top Three.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oguri, Creek, and Inari. Recently, more and more
people have been referring to them collectively
as such.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Three shining stars whose tale will be told for all
eternity. It's as if that title serves as proof of the
status they've been promised.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...It's a title very much worthy of overturning.
choice_data_list:
That sounds like something the villain would
say.

That sounds like something the villain would
say.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, perhaps you're onto something there. After
all, we are out to pulverize countless dreams.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...I simply felt like saying that. It rolls off the
tongue surprisingly nicely, doesn't it? ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan seems to have grown somewhat
mischievous over the past three years. I wonder
what her nanny would have to say about that...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Well... I shall be on my way.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry. I shall follow through on my word,
and leave a lasting impression of all that I'm
capable of in this moment.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Well, look who's here.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Mejiro Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oguri, Inari...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(Hehe, it's rather impressive seeing them up close.
I can see that they're both in tip-top condition.)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Right then, you two. Let's go ahead and make this
one a race to remember... Of course, it goes
without saying I'm going to be the star of this
show.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'm well aware of both your strengths. Neither of
you are taking my win, though.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I shan't be handing anyone victory on a silver
platter myself either. I mean to compete with my
all... and to win.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(Here I go... Time to take my position as one of
the greats!)
